issue.message: Field requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.view.WindowManager.LayoutParams#TYPE_APPLICATION_OVERLAY`
Call requires API level 26, or core library desugaring (current min is 24): `java.time.Instant#now`
Call requires API level 26, or core library desugaring (current min is 24): `java.time.Instant#minusSeconds`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.app.NotificationChannel()`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.app.NotificationChannel#setDescription`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.app.NotificationChannel#setDescription`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.app.NotificationChannel#setSound`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.app.NotificationManager#createNotificationChannel`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.os.VibrationEffect#createWaveform`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.os.Vibrator#vibrate`
